introduction.zh: 在特殊魔力的影响下，会改变自身的身体构造。“这是关于勇气的故事，他很脆弱却也不曾退缩,这是关于梦想的故事，梦很简单却也执着。这就是我，迪莫”。
introduction.en:
Under the influence of special magic, its own physical structure can change. 
This is a story about courage — though fragile, it never retreats. 
This is a story about dreams — simple in nature, yet held with unwavering resolve. 
This is who I am: Dimo.

introduction.zh: 喜欢阳光,喜欢新鲜的空气,会摇晃尾巴,受到惊吓会快速逃跑。虽然很胆小,但是也有时候非常调皮。
introduction.en: Loves sunshine and fresh air, wags its tail, and bolts away when startled. Though timid, it can be quite mischievous at times.

introduction.zh: 爱在泉水边嬉戏,是瞄瞄的进化型,芭蕉叶状的尾巴变成了两条。胆量变大了，会经常吐舌头挑衅对手。
introduction.en: It loves to play by the spring, and is the evolved form of MiaoMiao. Its banana-leaf-like tail has become two. Bolder now, it often sticks out its tongue to taunt opponents.

introduction.zh: 普遍性情温和,体型巨大,据说深吸一口气能呼出将洛克都吹走的狂风。三条尾巴非常锋利,用巨大的身体可以冲撞碾压对手。但通常情况下举止动作十分轻柔。
introduction.en: It is generally gentle in temperament and enormous in size. Rumor has it that a deep breath can blow a gale strong enough to sweep away the kingdom. Its three tails are very sharp, and its massive body can charge and crush opponents. But in most cases, its movements are remarkably gentle.

introduction.zh: 像一团迸发的小火花，坦诚炙热，生性勇敢无畏。能熟练运用火元素，偶尔有点冒失，是值得信赖的伙伴。
introduction.en: Like a burst of tiny sparks, it is sincere and fiery, brave and fearless by nature. It wields fire elements with skill, though it can be a bit reckless at times, and is a trustworthy companion.

distribution.zh: 维苏威火山口打野怪几率刷新、弹弹机
distribution.en: Mount Vesuvius Crater Monster Spawn Rate Refresh, Bouncy Machine

introduction.zh: 长出了一对大翅膀，但似乎并不是用来飞行的。能用双手释放出更加强力的火焰，但不太熟练。
introduction.en: It has grown a pair of large wings, though they do not seem to be for flying. It can release stronger flames with both hands, but is not very skilled yet.

introduction.zh: 强大的火焰之灵，只是靠近它就能够感受到温度的急剧变化。如果没有脖子上的项圈，它的火焰可能会暴走。 “在磨练中成长，在烈火中重生,用意志在战斗，用生命在燃烧,永远的火神”。
introduction.en: A powerful spirit of flame; even approaching it, you can feel a sharp change in temperature. Without the collar around its neck, its flames might run wild. "It grows through trial, is reborn in blazing fire, fights with will, and burns with life forever the Fire God."

introduction.zh: 漂浮在水面上的精灵，没事吐个泡泡，头顶有一个红色的蝴蝶结。不在水中的时候,身体上也覆盖了一层液体薄膜。
introduction.en: A spirit that floats on the water's surface, it idly blows bubbles and wears a red bow on its head. When out of the water, its body is still covered by a thin liquid film.

distribution.zh: 杰诺斯浅海、弹弹机几率获得
distribution.en: Can be obtained from the Bounce Machine in Genos Shallows with a certain probability.

introduction.zh: 在水中自如地游动，头上的触角可以感受水中的变化，总是带着一颗球一样的东西。身旁环绕着特殊的水元素，水元素凝结体中蕴含魔法能量的波动。
introduction.en: It swims freely in the water, and the antennae on its head sense changes in the currents. It always carries something like a ball. Special water elements surround it, and the condensed water holds ripples of magical energy.

introduction.zh: 将刚刚孕育的胚胎顶在头上，胚胎由特殊水元素包裹着。能将身边的水元素汇集在一起喷射出去，产生强大的冲击力。 “无论是云中落下的一滴水，还是湖面中微风吹起的一道涟漪，都有她的身影”。
introduction.en: It carries newly formed embryos on its head, wrapped in special water elements. It can gather surrounding water elements and blast them outward, creating powerful impacts. "Whether it is a drop falling from the clouds or a ripple raised by a breeze on the lake, you can find her presence."

introduction.zh: 拥有极其柔软的被毛，似乎很讨厌肢体接触，抗拒被抚摸。非常聪慧的物种，对环境中与众不同的东西十分敏感,尤其对于闪光的物体和新奇的事物格外感兴趣。
introduction.en: It has an exceptionally soft coat and appears to dislike physical contact, resisting being touched or petted. An extremely intelligent species, it is highly sensitive to anything unusual in its environment, showing particular fascination with shiny objects and novel phenomena.

introduction.zh: 看似懒懒的，但感到危险时，柔软的身体会迅速缩回壳里。柔韧的尾巴看起来像海草，偶尔会被饥饿的水生精灵咬一口。
introduction.en: It may look lazy and unhurried, but when danger approaches, its soft body swiftly retreats into its shell. Its flexible tail resembles seaweed, and now and then it gets nipped by hungry aquatic sprites.

introduction.zh: 看似懒懒的，但感到危险时，柔软的身体会迅速缩回壳里。柔韧的尾巴看起来像海草，偶尔会被饥饿的水生精灵咬一口。硬壳精灵。很少再缩进壳里，即使遇到危险也会勇敢面对。甲壳内一部分是空气，一部分是水，通过喷嘴来调节重量从而在水中下潜和上浮。
introduction.en: It may look lazy and unhurried, but when danger approaches, its soft body swiftly retreats into its shell. Its flexible tail resembles seaweed, and now and then it gets nipped by hungry aquatic sprites. A hard-shelled spirit. It rarely retreats into its shell anymore, choosing to face danger bravely. Inside its shell, part is filled with air and part with water, allowing it to adjust its weight through a nozzle to dive and surface in water.

introduction.zh: 硬壳精灵。进化之后体重增长到原来的三倍多，前肢的力量也变得十分发达。前面有坚硬的尖角，背后有甲壳和水炮的泵口，是像堡垒一样可靠的存在。
introduction.en: A hard-shelled spirit. After evolving, its weight increases to more than three times its original, and the strength of its forelimbs becomes highly developed. It has a solid horn at the front, and a shell with a water-cannon pump at the back, making it a presence as reliable as a fortress.

introduction.zh: 新生的小家伙，有着雪花一般绵软而细密的绒毛。因为翅膀太小了，需要用尽全力才可能飞起一点点高度。不为人知的小爱好是喜欢用幼嫩的喙啄刚落地的新雪，不知道是食用还是玩耍。
introduction.en: A newly born little creature covered in soft, dense down like snowflakes. Its wings are still too small, so it must use all its strength just to lift itself slightly off the ground. An unknown little habit of its is pecking at freshly fallen snow with its tender beak—whether for eating or simply for play, no one really knows.

introduction.zh: 体型又小又圆,眼睛周围生长着一层柔软绒毛。成长过程中会在冬天褪一次毛，它褪下的羽毛是一种非常珍贵的魔法道具。
introduction.en: Small and round in shape, with a layer of soft down growing around its eyes. During its growth, it molts once each winter, and the feathers it sheds are extremely valuable magical materials.

introduction.zh: 眼神锐利，有着绅士般冷静而又端庄的非凡气质，让它在贵族当中颇有人气。拥有卓越的视力，即使在百米高空中飞行时也能看清地面上的动静。
introduction.en: With sharp eyes and an extraordinary aura that is calm, dignified, and gentlemanly, it is highly favored among nobles. Possessing exceptional eyesight, it can clearly observe movements on the ground even while flying at heights of over a hundred meters.

introduction.zh: 幼体的圆眼蜘蛛并不太能织网捕食，多以青草，树果为食。复眼获取信息范围极大，速度极快，即便是独眼的圆眼蜘蛛获取信息速度远超过洛克族100倍。
introduction.en: Juvenile Round-Eyed Spiders are not yet skilled at weaving webs to hunt, and mainly feed on grass and tree fruits. Their compound eyes grant an extremely wide range of perception and astonishing speed of information gathering. Even a one-eyed Round-Eyed Spider can process information over a hundred times faster than the Rock tribe.

introduction.zh: 各关节覆盖着绒毛，绒毛可以疏水和保暖。在寒冷下雨的时候，也可以自由行走。世界的动态在它们眼里显得很慢，所以大部份尖角蜘蛛都是急性子。
introduction.en: Its joints are covered with fine fuzz that repels water and provides warmth, allowing it to move freely even in cold and rainy conditions. The world appears to move very slowly in its eyes, which is why most Horned Spiders are short-tempered and impatient.

introduction.zh: 颜色鲜艳美丽，尾部丝囊中的液体有剧毒，织出的蜘蛛网散发异香。蜘蛛精灵。依靠体毒和利刺能轻易捕获猎物，从不群居，个体之间都保持一定距离，互不侵犯。
introduction.en: Vivid and beautifully colored, the liquid stored in the silk sac at the end of its body is highly toxic, and the webs it weaves emit a strange, alluring fragrance. A spider-type spirit. It relies on its bodily toxins and sharp spines to easily capture prey. It never lives in groups; individuals always keep a certain distance from one another and do not encroach on each other’s territory.
